# Results


## Taxon-specific model predictions

AIC and BIC values of weight-at-size models can be found in Table \@ref(tab:tablemodelsfits).


## Comparison to previous estimates obtained in SAS

The length-weight regression parameters that were obtained by the SAS scripts sometimes led to biased weight predictions, especially at large lengths. 
To exemplify the superiority of our approach, we present a few selected cases where the mixed effects approach resolves biases that were present in the relationships estimated in SAS.
